Name: Early 2000s
Description: Peak flip‑phone era. Bring the hits (or deep cuts) from roughly 2000–2009.

Name: European Summer
Description: Soundtrack your Euro trip. Think beaches, clubs, terraces, and sunset drinks across the continent.

Name: Marketing Jams
Description: Songs used in ads, branding moments, or campaigns that stuck in your head long after the commercial ended.

Name: Songs Older Than the Player Submitting the Song
Description: Dig into the archives. Submit a track that dropped before you were even born and prove good music is timeless.

Name: One‑Word Song Titles
Description: Keep it simple. The entire title must be just one word.
